title: Olivia Dean Wins Best New Artist at 2026 Grammy Awards
text: Olivia Dean, a British singer, won the coveted Best New Artist category at Sunday's Grammy Awards ceremony. The award was presented by Chappell Roan, who won the same award in 2025. The competition featured eight nominees with over 27 billion combined streams, including The Marias, Addison Rae, KATSEYE, Leon Thomas, Alex Warren, Lola Young, and Sombr. Dean accepted the award emotionally, thanking her team, particularly her manager Emily. She then addressed the audience about immigration, stating: I'm up here as a granddaughter of an immigrant...I'm a product of bravery and I think those people deserve to be celebrated. The Best New Artist category is unique among Grammy awards as it allows voting by all 15,000 Recording Academy members, rather than just specialists in specific genres.
